name: aivi-engagement
description: Score leads and launch AI voice and SMS engagement sequences. Supports real estate, debt collection, healthcare, and home services verticals.
author: AIVI

skills.name: qualify_lead
skills.description: Phone validation, litigator check, contactability, economic indicators, tier classification

skills.name: score_lead
skills.description: Score a lead using ML bandit + call history + RRDB enrichment

skills.name: launch_sequence
skills.description: Launch 1, 3, or 12-day AI voice + SMS engagement sequence

skills.name: decide_next_action
skills.description: ML recommendation for optimal next channel and timing
